posts.title: Joe Rogan makes a great point: When a country like China says they want to stay culturally and ethnically Chinese, it’s celebrated. But if a European country like Poland wants the same for White people, they're labeled racist

twitter.content:
Joe Rogan makes a great point: When a country like China says they want to stay culturally and ethnically Chinese, it’s celebrated. 

But if a European country like Poland wants the same for White people, they're labeled racist.
